registration.description: Voter registration in India is the process of getting your name included in the Electoral Roll managed by the Election Commission of India.
registration.deadline: Continuous process; special revision drives are conducted before major elections
registration.how_to_check: Search your name on the NVSP website or Voter Helpline App

important_dates.description: Election Commission announces schedule and phases
Political parties and candidates प्रचार their agenda
Voting happens in multiple phases across states
Votes are counted and results declared

voting_methods.in_person: Primary method; voters cast vote at assigned polling booth using EVM (Electronic Voting Machine)
voting_methods.postal_ballot: Available for service voters, senior citizens (80+), and persons with disabilities
voting_methods.proxy_voting: Allowed for armed forces personnel under specific conditions

polling_place_info.where_to_find: Check Voter Slip, NVSP website, or Voter Helpline App
polling_place_info.hours: Typically 7 AM – 6 PM (may vary slightly by region)
polling_place_info.machine_used: EVM with VVPAT (Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail)

election_types.lok_sabha: National elections to elect Members of Parliament
